title: [MTR] ADL Enviro500 MMC Bus Pack
description: Adds the Enviro500 MMC bus, built by Alexander Dennis, in 4 liveries from Hong Kong to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
A simple model based on the **ADL enviro500 MMC** bus, featuring 3 axles and 2 doors with **left hand drive**. The MMC models have been in Hong Kong since 2013 and have been a crucial part of the city's bus fleet.

This pack adds 4 liveries to the bus (**KMB Gold, KMB Red, Citybus and New World First Bus**)

Credits to Xavierton for the amazing screenshots from the XCP server!! Many Thanks!
